name: apple-mcp
description: MCP server for Apple Calendar, Mail, and Reminders on macOS using native EventKit

scripts.build: npm run build:swift && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:swift: cd swift && swift build -c release -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker Sources/AppleBridge/Info.plist
scripts.clean: rm -rf build && cd swift && swift package clean

author: l22.io GmbH
